name: Tastes Like Butterfingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except peanut butter in a saucepan.
2. Cook to 300 degrees Fahrenheit, stirring frequently until the mixture thickens slightly.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter until combined.
4. Quickly pour the mixture onto a countertop or marble slab and form into three logs or ropes.
5. Cut with kitchen shears.
6. Allow to cool completely.
7. Dip in dipping chocolate. These can also be rolled in coconut shreds while still warm.
